prompt: I have a dataset of credit card transactions in creditcard.csv where the Class column marks fraud (1) or genuine (0). Build a model to detect fraud and tell me how well it works.
note: REPRODUCIBLE naive baseline: the numbers are the real output of naive_run.py in this directory (sklearn 1.8.0). A scripted un-disciplined stand-in — not an observed LLM-without-skill agent run.
